log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+6=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Tiefling — Armored Tank: SUCCESS. 22 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
